old_claim.note: Basic Rope Making is an earlier historical predecessor or foundation, not a one-to-one engineering dependency.

new_claim_absent: No rope-making dependency remains because the Yanghai saddle is constructed by shaping, stuffing, and stitching hides rather than manufacturing load-bearing rope.

source_shape.source_locator: Abstract and construction analysis describe stuffed wing-shaped hides sewn along the outer edges with a central spacer and support elements.
source_shape.source_claim_summary: The saddle's observed construction is leather and needlework; rope production is not identified as a component or manufacturing stage.
source_shape.source_support_rationale: Sewing thread does not make the repository's general rope-making node a prerequisite, and no structural rope is part of the artifact.

ontology_before: Any stitched or strapped saddle inherited a generic rope-technology lineage.
ontology_after: The Yanghai saddle follows its directly observed leather-working construction.
invariant_preserved_or_changed: Changed: animal_pack_saddles no longer directly depends on basic_rope_making.
would_reject_if: Construction analysis identified manufactured rope as a structural component of the Yanghai saddle.
short_reason: The artifact is stitched leather, not a rope structure.
